action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 failed because train.py imports MLPModel but model.py defines MLPRegressor. Predict.py has the same mistake. Analysis: Need to align class names. Fix train.py and predict.py to use MLPRegressor. Also previous verbose scheduler error is already fixed (no verbose). Cache fingerprints exist, so training will be fast. Decision: Update files, run training for 30 epochs, then submit eval next iteration to get baseline MAE and measure iteration time.
